en.community.channel.general.title: General
en.community.channel.ideas.body: Explore proposals before they become roadmap work.
en.community.channel.ideas.title: Ideas
en.community.channel.qa.body: Ask a focused question and mark the answer that solved it.
en.community.channel.qa.title: Q&A
en.community.channel.show.body: Share scenes, tools, experiments, and lessons learned.
en.community.channel.show.title: Show and tell
en.community.channels.intro: Discussions are for conversation and support. Issues are for reproducible defects and accepted implementation work.
en.community.channels.title: Put the conversation where future readers will look for it.
en.community.contract.item1: GitHub Discussions stores topics, answers, reactions, and the embedded wall.
en.community.contract.item2: GitHub Issues stores reproducible bugs and actionable engineering tasks.
en.community.contract.item3: GitHub permissions and moderation remain the authority; the website is a presentation layer.
en.community.contract.admin: ChenlizheMe is the sole declared Infernux community administrator; effective moderation authority is still enforced by GitHub repository permissions.
en.community.contract.title: One identity, one moderation surface, no duplicate content store.
en.community.data.auth.body: Giscus uses GitHub OAuth for comments and may keep a server-encrypted sign-in token in giscus.app localStorage. Infernux receives neither your password nor that access token.
en.community.data.auth.title: Sign-in boundary
en.community.data.intro: Infernux has no forum account or post database. The page uses a few named external services, and GitHub remains the public record.
en.community.data.local.body: This site stores language, theme, optional learning-path progress, and up to eight recent document links in localStorage. Recent links expire after 180 days. Public topic metadata is cached for five minutes, and choosing “Load replies” is remembered only in the current tab via sessionStorage. It sets no first-party account cookie and keeps no user profile.
en.community.data.local.title: Local preferences
en.community.data.network.body: The public topic list contacts GitHub's API. giscus.app is contacted only after you choose “Load replies”; fonts and icons remain on the Infernux origin.
en.community.data.network.title: External requests
en.community.data.public.body: The topic relay reads public Discussion metadata from GitHub without a token. Posts, replies, Issues, authors, and timestamps remain public and are stored on GitHub.
en.community.data.public.title: Public GitHub content
en.community.data.title: Know what leaves this page.
en.community.feed.intro: Loaded from GitHub's public API and cached in this tab for five minutes. No access token or private profile data is stored.
en.community.feed.title: Latest public discussions.
en.community.hero.description: Topics, replies, moderation, and identity remain on GitHub. The website provides a focused doorway; Discussions stores conversations and Issues stores reproducible work.
en.community.hero.title: A small forum without a shadow database.
en.community.identity: Reading is public. Posting and replying require GitHub sign-in; the website never receives your GitHub password.
en.community.issue.bug.body: Capture a reproducible engine, tooling, packaging, or documentation defect.
en.community.issue.bug.title: Bug report
en.community.issue.feature.body: Tie a proposed capability or workflow improvement to a concrete user problem.
en.community.issue.feature.title: Feature request
en.community.issue.question.body: Use this when a usage question needs an answer that can be resolved and referenced as engineering work.
en.community.issue.question.title: Tracked question
en.community.issues.intro: Use a structured form when the outcome needs reproduction steps, implementation scope, or a durable resolution. Open-ended conversation belongs in Discussions.
en.community.issues.title: Turn reproducible work into a trackable GitHub Issue.
en.community.wall.intro: Embedded replies stay off until you choose to load them. Sign-in and moderation remain on GitHub.
en.community.wall.title: Leave a short note without leaving the site.
en.cta.desc: Infernux (熔炉) is for teams who want source access, clear architecture, and a workflow they can reshape. Start with the docs, read the code, and push the engine forward.
en.cta.title: Build something that truly belongs to you.
en.downloadPage.assets.intro: Both files are the exact assets published with GitHub release v0.2.1.
en.downloadPage.assets.title: Hub for normal use. Wheel for controlled Python environments.
en.downloadPage.fallback: The live manifest could not be read. The embedded v0.2.1 links and checksums remain available.
en.downloadPage.hero.description: The website publishes identity, size, and SHA-256 evidence. GitHub Releases remains the only binary host.
en.downloadPage.hero.title: Download from the source. Verify before launch.
en.downloadPage.hub.body: Install the project launcher and its managed Python 3.12 runtime. This is the normal entry point for creating and opening projects.
en.downloadPage.hub.title: Infernux Hub Installer
en.downloadPage.ready: Release manifest passed browser-side format checks; deployment health verifies it against GitHub Releases.
en.downloadPage.verify.boundary: SHA-256 detects whether the downloaded bytes differ from the reviewed GitHub asset. It is not proof of publisher identity, and this release manifest declares no separate signature. Download only from the canonical GitHub Releases links on this page.
en.downloadPage.releaseNotes.fallback: Structured notes are unavailable; use the GitHub Release link below.
en.downloadPage.releaseNotes.intro: Rendered from the same UpdateLog.md used as the canonical GitHub Release body.
en.downloadPage.releaseNotes.ready: Canonical English release notes · sourced from UpdateLog.md
en.downloadPage.releaseNotes.sourceLanguage: Release notes are shown in their canonical English source language.
en.downloadPage.releaseNotes.title: What changed in this build.
en.downloadPage.requirements.helpBody: If verification or installation fails, retain the filename, checksum, Windows version, GPU driver, and exact error before opening an Issue.
en.downloadPage.requirements.previewBody: APIs and project formats are still evolving. Keep projects in version control and read the Roadmap before production commitments.
en.downloadPage.requirements.systemBody: Windows 10 or 11, 64-bit, with a current Vulkan-capable graphics driver. The standalone wheel requires CPython 3.12 x64.
en.downloadPage.requirements.title: Know the preview boundary.
en.downloadPage.verify.body: Compare the command output with the checksum shown on the artifact card.
en.downloadPage.verify.title: Verify the file before running it.
en.downloadPage.webApp.body: Install this website as a lightweight app for a dedicated window, quick launch, and resilient access to pages you have already visited.
en.downloadPage.webApp.boundary: This does not install the game engine or pre-download the complete Manual.
en.downloadPage.webApp.home: Launch from the home screen, Start menu, or app launcher.
en.downloadPage.webApp.offline: The shell and previously visited pages can recover when the connection drops.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.accepted: Installation accepted. The launcher may take a moment to appear.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.checking: Checking whether this browser can install the web app…
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.dismissed: Installation dismissed. Reload or use the browser menu when you want to try again.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.failed: The browser could not open the prompt. Use its install menu instead.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.installed: Installed, or already running in standalone app mode.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.iosOther: Open this page in Safari, then tap Share and Add to Home Screen.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.iosSafari: Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.prompting: Waiting for the browser's installation decision…
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.ready: Ready: this browser can install the documentation app.
en.downloadPage.webApp.status.unavailable: No direct prompt is available. Use the browser's Install app or Add to home screen menu when offered.
en.downloadPage.webApp.title: Keep the Infernux knowledge deck within reach.
en.downloadPage.wheel.body: Use this only when you manage the Python environment yourself. It targets CPython 3.12 on Windows x64.
en.downloadPage.wheel.title: Windows Python Wheel
en.error.body: The page may have moved during a documentation rebuild. Search the current release index, return to the learning deck, or inspect the repository.
en.error.heading: That route is no longer on the flight plan.
en.error.hint: Tip: press Ctrl/⌘ + K from any main page, or / inside generated documentation, to reopen this search.
en.error.title: Signal lost · Infernux
en.footer.tagline: Open code, explicit architecture, and a render stack you can actually reason about.
en.hero.subtitle: Programmable render stack · Unity-like API shape · high-performance core
en.home.capabilities.ai.body: The FastMCP editor plane couples hierarchical discovery (mcp.catalog.*), subsystem guides with knowledge-token gates, configurable capability profiles, and trace/evolution hooks so projects can extend MCP safely—not brittle glue scripts. Scene/asset guards, transactional workflows where enabled, and structured recovery payloads (stop_repeating, suggested next tools) steer assistants toward validated edits.
en.home.capabilities.ai.title: Self-evolving MCP with strong validation
en.home.capabilities.animation.body: Sprite-based SpiritAnimator, AnimClip2D and AnimClip3D assets, embedded FBX takes, skeletal animation playback, skinned mesh rendering, and an FSM editor for state machines.
en.home.capabilities.animation.title: 2D / 3D animation stack
en.home.capabilities.asset.body: GUID-based AssetDatabase, .meta sidecar files, dependency tracking, scene serialization, asset previews, Nuitka-based standalone build, and a PySide6 Hub launcher.
en.home.capabilities.asset.title: Asset & project pipeline
en.home.capabilities.editor.body: Hierarchy, Inspector, Scene View, Game View, Project, Console, UI editor, Toolbar, gizmos, multi-selection, undo / redo, and play-mode scene isolation in a single shell.
en.home.capabilities.editor.title: 12-panel editor shell
en.home.capabilities.intro: The engine is still in active development: we are tightening every subsystem to reach a solid technical preview. Open issues and send PRs on GitHub.
en.home.capabilities.physics.body: Rigid bodies, colliders, scene queries, collision callbacks, layer filtering, and scene-synchronized transforms backed by Jolt Physics.
en.home.capabilities.physics.title: Jolt rigid bodies
en.home.capabilities.render.body: Forward and deferred rendering, PBR materials, cascaded shadows, MSAA, shader reflection, post-processing stack, and RenderGraph-based pass scheduling.
en.home.capabilities.render.title: Vulkan render core
en.home.capabilities.script.body: Unity-style component lifecycle, serialized inspector fields, decorators, input APIs, coroutines, prefabs, hot-reload, and a built-in @njit decorator that opts in to Numba JIT with automatic pure-Python fallback.
en.home.capabilities.script.title: Python gameplay layer
en.home.capabilities.title: Where the engine stands today.
en.home.demo.intro: A dual-axis sine-wave workload updates a 100 × 100 cube grid through the Batch + JIT path while one directional light and one shared material keep the render setup explicit.
en.home.demo.panel.item1: Test environment: 1920 × 1080, V-Sync off, Windows 11, Core Ultra 7 265K, RTX 5070 Ti and 64 GB DDR5-6400.
en.home.demo.panel.item2: After a 60-frame warm-up, the 10,000-cube single-material workload averaged 127 FPS in the Infernux editor and 171 FPS at runtime over 300 frames.
en.home.demo.panel.item3: Unity 6 is included only as a reference: shading complexity, batching and editor maturity differ. Read the methodology and complete tables before comparing results.
en.home.demo.panel.title: Benchmark evidence and limits
en.home.demo.title: 10,000-cube reference workload running inside the editor.
en.home.hero.description: Infernux (熔炉) is a game engine built from a Python–C++ split: C++17 powers the high-performance core; Python 3.12 drives editor tooling and is the gameplay scripting layer for developers.
en.home.hero.kicker: Open source · MIT · Win64 (broader platforms in development)
en.home.hero.platform: Windows 10/11 x64 · v0.2.1 technical preview · broader platforms in development
en.home.hero.title: Infernux — the forge is lit. Come stoke the fire.
en.home.manifesto: Infernux stands on a simple idea: commercial engine licenses keep getting heavier, and indies and small teams pay the price. When “vendor freedom” comes with a growing bill, open source stops being optional — it’s the answer. That is what 熔炉 is for.
en.home.status.card1.body: Rendering, physics, audio, Python scripting, prefabs, game UI, editor authoring, GUID asset workflows, 2D/3D animation previews, skinned meshes, asset previews, standalone build, and the MCP automation plane (catalog guides, token gates, trace/evolution) are all online.
en.home.status.card1.title: Runtime, editor, and animation foundation
en.home.status.card2.body: Upcoming milestones focus on richer UI controls, GPU particles, terrain, onboarding material, and stronger content production paths.
en.home.status.card2.title: Advanced UI and content scale
en.home.status.intro: The engine now includes preview animation controllers, basic Timeline workflows, and a validated MCP control plane for agents; the roadmap still calls out what needs production hardening.
en.home.status.title: Release 0.2.1: animation controllers, Timeline, and validated MCP workflows.
en.home.system.card1.body: We borrow interaction patterns from familiar tools and engines to reduce switching friction. There is a Figma-like standalone UI editor and a Python runtime that mirrors Unity’s at play time.
en.home.system.card1.title: Principle I · Low migration cost
en.home.system.card2.body: Heavy features like the render path exist to be extended, not worshipped. Programmable pipelines and other advanced APIs are shaped so newcomers can follow them without fighting the engine.
en.home.system.card2.title: Principle II · Intuitive first
en.home.system.card3.body: The engine is and will stay as free for indies and small teams to use commercially as we can make it, so more developers can reach state-of-the-art technology.
en.home.system.card3.title: Principle III · No business trap
en.home.system.intro: The design targets engineering control instead of platform lock-in. Each principle cuts hidden cost for teams shipping real games and real tools.
en.home.system.title: Three ideas the whole engine is built around.
en.pageTitle.index: 熔炉 · Infernux — Open game engine
en.roadmap.hero.description: 熔炉 is moving from technical preview toward a more complete production pipeline. The priorities below group work by release leverage and workflow impact, not by vague marketing buckets.
en.roadmap.hero.title: A roadmap that reads like engineering work, not decorative ambition.
en.roadmap.lanes.card1.item1: Animation state machines, Timeline, and rigged character workflows beyond the 0.2.1 foundation.
en.roadmap.lanes.card1.item2: Advanced UI controls (ScrollView, Slider, layout groups).
en.roadmap.lanes.card1.item3: Safer asset rename and dependency repair paths.
en.roadmap.lanes.card1.title: Authoring band
en.roadmap.lanes.card2.item2: Terrain system for larger production scenes.
en.roadmap.lanes.card2.item3: Better scene composition for reusable runtime content.
en.roadmap.lanes.card2.title: Content band
en.roadmap.lanes.card3.item2: A more robust project lifecycle from prototype to release.
en.roadmap.lanes.card3.title: Shipping band
en.roadmap.lanes.card4.item1: Keep render and tooling internals explicit as the engine grows.
en.roadmap.lanes.card4.item2: Avoid accidental complexity that would erase the engine's main advantage.
en.roadmap.lanes.card4.item3: Preserve scriptability while strengthening native ownership boundaries.
en.roadmap.lanes.card4.title: Architecture band
en.roadmap.lanes.intro: Each band answers one practical question: can teams author faster, can content scale, can projects ship, and can the architecture stay readable while the engine grows?
en.roadmap.lanes.title: The roadmap is split by what each band actually unlocks.
en.roadmap.priorities.card1.body: 2D / 3D animation previews, Timeline, animation FSMs, and skinned meshes shipped in 0.2.1. The next focus is hardening retargeting, blend trees, and runtime control surfaces.
en.roadmap.priorities.card1.title: Animation system maturation
en.roadmap.priorities.card2.body: The base UI system (Canvas, Text, Image, Button) is stable. ScrollView, Slider, layout groups, and editor-level UI tools come next.
en.roadmap.priorities.card2.title: Advanced UI controls
en.roadmap.priorities.card3.body: The API reference is auto-generated. Getting-started guides, architecture notes, and example projects are needed to lower the onboarding barrier.
en.roadmap.priorities.card3.title: Documentation & onboarding
en.roadmap.priorities.intro: These items are the ones most likely to improve the engine's day-to-day usefulness for contributors and early projects.
en.roadmap.priorities.title: What deserves attention in the next two milestones.
en.roadmap.release.current.item1: Vulkan renderer, Python scripting, 12-panel editor, audio, Jolt physics, prefabs, game UI, 2D/3D animation previews, skinned meshes, asset previews, and standalone build.
en.roadmap.release.current.item2: Usable for serious technical preview work today: scripting, physics, audio, rendering, UI, animation previews, and editor tooling all running in a single stack.
en.roadmap.release.current.title: Runtime, editor, and animation foundation
en.roadmap.release.long.item1: Networking foundations and a more complete project lifecycle from prototype to release.
en.roadmap.release.long.item2: Move from Windows-first technical preview toward a multi-platform production engine.
en.roadmap.release.long.title: Networking and project lifecycle
en.roadmap.release.mid.item1: GPU particle system, terrain, and broader model and material pipeline.
en.roadmap.release.mid.item2: Expand the range of visual content the engine can produce without collapsing under content complexity.
en.roadmap.release.mid.title: Particles, terrain, and content pipeline
en.roadmap.release.next.item1: Advanced UI controls, GPU particles, terrain, and stronger content production paths.
en.roadmap.release.next.item2: Support larger projects with richer runtime UI, scene content, and production workflows.
en.roadmap.release.next.title: Advanced UI and content scale
en.wiki.health.intro: This panel is generated from the same indexes used by search, CI, and Agent workflows. It does not hide Preview or Experimental material.
en.wiki.health.noScript: Open the machine-readable documentation health report.
en.wiki.health.title: Know what is documented, how mature it is, and when the evidence was checked.
en.wiki.hero.description: Use this page as the entry chart into the scripting API, architecture notes, repository setup, and long-form guides for 熔炉.
en.wiki.hero.title: Documentation should reduce uncertainty, not just prove that docs exist.
en.wiki.library.intro: Detailed articles covering how 熔炉 works internally and how to scale your project.
en.wiki.library.title: Architecture notes, advanced guides, and system deep-dives.
en.wiki.start.card1.body: Install the Hub, create a project, understand the editor shell, and run your first scene.
en.wiki.start.card1.title: Getting started
en.wiki.start.card2.body: Add behavior with Python, expose fields to the Inspector, and verify the component lifecycle.
en.wiki.start.card2.title: Your first component
en.wiki.start.card3.body: Configure Build Settings, create a Windows player, and verify the package outside the editor.
en.wiki.start.card3.title: Build and share
en.wiki.start.card4.body: Choose the right guide for scenes, assets, rendering, physics, UI, animation, and debugging.
en.wiki.start.card4.title: Read the engine manual
en.wiki.start.card5.body: Inspect classes, methods, enums, signatures, and stable deep links for code or Agent workflows.
en.wiki.start.card5.title: Search the API reference
en.wiki.start.intro: First Flight takes 25–40 minutes across three steps. Your first playable arrives after step 2, and progress stays on this device. The manual explains systems; the API reference answers exact symbol questions.
en.wiki.start.title: Move from install to a running component without guessing the route.

zh.community.channel.general.body: 开放的引擎与项目交流。
zh.community.channel.general.title: 综合讨论
zh.community.channel.ideas.body: 在进入路线图之前探索和打磨提案。
zh.community.channel.ideas.title: 想法
zh.community.channel.qa.body: 提出聚焦的问题，并标记真正解决问题的答案。
zh.community.channel.qa.title: 问答
zh.community.channel.show.body: 分享场景、工具、实验与经验。
zh.community.channel.show.title: 作品展示
zh.community.channels.intro: Discussions 用于交流与支持；Issues 用于可复现缺陷和已接受的工程任务。
zh.community.channels.title: 把交流放到未来读者真正会寻找的位置。
zh.community.contract.item1: GitHub Discussions 保存话题、回答、反应和嵌入式留言墙。
zh.community.contract.item2: GitHub Issues 保存可复现缺陷与可执行工程任务。
zh.community.contract.item3: GitHub 权限与管理规则始终是权威来源；网站只是呈现层。
zh.community.contract.admin: ChenlizheMe 是当前唯一声明的 Infernux 社区管理员；实际管理权限仍由 GitHub 仓库权限强制执行。
zh.community.contract.title: 一套身份、一处管理界面、不复制内容数据库。
zh.community.data.auth.body: Giscus 使用 GitHub OAuth 处理评论，并可能在 giscus.app 的 localStorage 中保存经服务端加密的登录令牌；Infernux 不会收到你的密码或该访问令牌。
zh.community.data.auth.title: 登录边界
zh.community.data.intro: Infernux 不建立论坛账号或帖子数据库。此页只使用明确列出的外部服务，GitHub 始终是公开记录的权威来源。
zh.community.data.local.body: 本站在 localStorage 保存语言、主题、可选的学习路径进度，以及最多八条最近文档链接；最近链接会在 180 天后过期。公开话题元数据缓存五分钟，选择“加载回复”的偏好只通过 sessionStorage 保留在当前标签页。不设置第一方账号 Cookie，也不保存用户档案。
zh.community.data.local.title: 本地偏好
zh.community.data.network.body: 公开话题列表会访问 GitHub API；只有在你选择“加载回复”后才会连接 giscus.app，字体和图标仍由 Infernux 自身域名提供。
zh.community.data.network.title: 外部请求
zh.community.data.public.body: 话题列表不携带令牌，只读取 GitHub 上公开的 Discussion 元数据。帖子、回复、Issue、作者与时间均公开并存储于 GitHub。
zh.community.data.public.title: 公开 GitHub 内容
zh.community.data.title: 清楚知道哪些数据会离开此页面。
zh.community.feed.intro: 内容来自 GitHub 公共 API，并在当前标签页缓存五分钟；本页不保存访问令牌或私有资料。
zh.community.feed.loading: 正在连接 GitHub 链路……
zh.community.feed.title: 最近的公开讨论。
zh.community.hero.badge: 社区链路 · GITHUB 数据层
zh.community.hero.description: 话题、回复、管理与身份都留在 GitHub。网站只提供聚焦的入口；Discussions 保存交流，Issues 保存可复现的工作。
zh.community.hero.kicker: 交流 · 提问 · 提议 · 报告
zh.community.hero.title: 一个没有影子数据库的小论坛。
zh.community.identity: 阅读完全公开。发帖和回复需要登录 GitHub；本站不会接触你的 GitHub 密码。
zh.community.issue.bug.body: 记录可复现的引擎、工具、打包或文档缺陷。
zh.community.issue.bug.title: 缺陷报告
zh.community.issue.feature.body: 把能力或工作流改进提案绑定到具体用户问题。
zh.community.issue.feature.title: 功能请求
zh.community.issue.question.body: 适用于需要明确解决、并作为工程记录长期引用的使用问题。
zh.community.issue.question.title: 跟踪型问题
zh.community.issues.intro: 当结果需要复现步骤、实现范围或明确结论时，使用结构化表单；开放讨论继续放在 Discussions。
zh.community.issues.title: 把可复现、可执行的工作转为可追踪的 GitHub Issue。
zh.community.wall.intro: 只有在你主动选择加载后，站内回复才会连接 Giscus；登录与管理仍由 GitHub 负责。
zh.community.wall.title: 不离开网站，也能留下一条简短消息。
zh.cta.desc: 熔炉面向那些希望拥有源码访问权、清晰架构与可重塑工作流的团队。先看文档，再看代码，然后把这台引擎继续向前推。
zh.cta.title: 去构建真正属于你自己的东西。
zh.downloadPage.assets.intro: 两个文件均为 GitHub v0.2.1 Release 发布的原始资产。
zh.downloadPage.assets.title: 普通使用选择 Hub，自主管理 Python 环境选择 Wheel。
zh.downloadPage.fallback: 无法读取实时清单；页面内置的 v0.2.1 链接与校验值仍可使用。
zh.downloadPage.hero.badge: 发布舱 · 已验证产物
zh.downloadPage.hero.description: 网站提供身份、体积与 SHA-256 证据；GitHub Releases 始终是唯一二进制托管方。
zh.downloadPage.hero.title: 从源头下载，启动之前验证。
zh.downloadPage.hub.body: 安装项目启动器及其托管的 Python 3.12 运行时；这是创建与打开项目的正常入口。
zh.downloadPage.hub.title: Infernux Hub 安装器
zh.downloadPage.ready: 发布清单已通过浏览器端格式检查；部署健康检查会继续与 GitHub Releases 对照。
zh.downloadPage.verify.boundary: SHA-256 用于发现下载文件是否与已审阅的 GitHub 产物不同，但不能证明发布者身份；当前发布清单没有声明独立签名。请只使用本页指向 GitHub Releases 的权威链接下载。
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.fallback: 结构化发布说明不可用；请使用下方 GitHub Release 链接。
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.intro: 内容来自作为 GitHub Release 权威正文的同一份 UpdateLog.md。
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.loading: 正在读取结构化发布说明…
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.ready: 权威英文发布说明 · 来源 UpdateLog.md
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.sourceLanguage: 发布说明以权威英文源语言展示。
zh.downloadPage.releaseNotes.title: 这个版本发生了什么变化。
zh.downloadPage.requirements.helpBody: 验证或安装失败时，保留文件名、校验值、Windows 版本、GPU 驱动与完整错误后再提交 Issue。
zh.downloadPage.requirements.previewBody: API 与项目格式仍在演进。项目应进入版本控制，并在生产投入前阅读路线图。
zh.downloadPage.requirements.systemBody: Windows 10 或 11 64 位，并安装当前 Vulkan 图形驱动。独立 Wheel 需要 CPython 3.12 x64。
zh.downloadPage.requirements.title: 明确技术预览边界。
zh.downloadPage.verify.body: 把命令输出与产物卡片中的校验值逐字比较。
zh.downloadPage.verify.title: 运行前验证文件。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.body: 把本站安装为轻量应用，即可使用独立窗口、快速启动，并在断网时恢复你已经访问过的页面。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.boundary: 这不会安装游戏引擎，也不会预先下载完整 Manual。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.home: 从主屏幕、开始菜单或应用启动器直接打开。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.offline: 连接中断时，站点外壳和已访问页面仍可恢复。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.accepted: 已接受安装；启动图标可能需要片刻才会出现。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.checking: 正在检查此浏览器是否可以安装 Web App……
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.dismissed: 已取消安装；需要时可刷新页面或使用浏览器菜单重试。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.failed: 浏览器无法打开安装提示，请改用其安装菜单。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.installed: 应用已安装，或当前已经以独立应用模式运行。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.iosOther: 请在 Safari 中打开本页，再点“分享 → 添加到主屏幕”。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.iosSafari: Safari：轻点“分享”，然后选择“添加到主屏幕”。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.prompting: 正在等待浏览器中的安装选择……
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.ready: 已就绪：此浏览器可以安装文档应用。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.status.unavailable: 当前没有直接安装提示；浏览器提供时，请使用“安装应用”或“添加到主屏幕”菜单。
zh.downloadPage.webApp.title: 把 Infernux 知识台留在手边。
zh.downloadPage.wheel.body: 仅在自行管理 Python 环境时使用，目标为 Windows x64 上的 CPython 3.12。
zh.downloadPage.wheel.title: Windows Python Wheel
zh.error.body: 该页面可能在文档重建时移动。请搜索当前版本索引、返回学习中心，或检查代码仓库。
zh.error.heading: 这条路线已不在当前飞行计划中。
zh.error.hint: 提示：可在任意主页面按 Ctrl/⌘ + K，或在生成文档中按 /，重新打开此搜索。
zh.error.title: 信号丢失 · Infernux
zh.footer.tagline: 开放代码、明确架构，以及一套你能真正讲清楚的渲染栈。
zh.hero.subtitle: 可编程渲染管线 · 类Unity API架构 · 高性能内核
zh.home.capabilities.ai.body: 编辑器内置 FastMCP 服务：二级工具目录（mcp.catalog.*）、完整签名与示例、子系统指南 + 知识令牌门禁敏感写入；能力矩阵与追踪 / 自进化项目工具可按配置开启，让 Agent 工具链随项目成长而不是堆一次性脚本。配合场景与资产安全护栏、可选事务，以及带 stop_repeating 与下一步工具建议的结构化恢复信息，降低模型盲重试。
zh.home.capabilities.ai.title: 自进化 + 强验证的 MCP 控制面
zh.home.capabilities.animation.body: 基于精灵的 SpiritAnimator、AnimClip2D 与 AnimClip3D 资产、FBX 内嵌动作、骨骼动画播放、蒙皮网格渲染，以及用于编辑状态机的 FSM 面板。
zh.home.capabilities.animation.title: 2D / 3D 动画栈
zh.home.capabilities.asset.body: 基于 GUID 的 AssetDatabase、.meta 附属文件、依赖追踪、场景序列化、资产预览、Nuitka 独立构建，以及基于 PySide6 的 Hub 启动器。
zh.home.capabilities.asset.title: 资产与项目管线
zh.home.capabilities.editor.body: Hierarchy、Inspector、Scene View、Game View、Project、Console、UI 编辑、Toolbar、Gizmo、多选、撤销 / 重做与 Play 模式场景隔离全部集中在同一套外壳。
zh.home.capabilities.editor.title: 12 面板编辑器外壳
zh.home.capabilities.intro: 目前，引擎还处于紧张地开发阶段，我们正在一步一步完善各个功能，以期达到技术预览的标准。欢迎在Github上提Issue或是贡献自己的PR！
zh.home.capabilities.physics.body: 刚体、碰撞体、场景查询、碰撞回调、层过滤与场景同步变换，全部基于 Jolt Physics。
zh.home.capabilities.physics.title: Jolt 刚体物理
zh.home.capabilities.render.body: 前向 / 延迟渲染、PBR、级联阴影、MSAA、Shader 反射、后处理栈，以及基于 RenderGraph 的 Pass 调度。
zh.home.capabilities.render.title: Vulkan 渲染内核
zh.home.capabilities.script.body: 类 Unity 的组件生命周期、Inspector 可见的序列化字段、装饰器、输入 API、协程、预制体、热重载，以及内置 @njit 装饰器：自动接入 Numba JIT，并在不可用时降级为纯 Python。
zh.home.capabilities.script.title: Python 玩法层
zh.home.capabilities.title: 引擎现状。
zh.home.demo.intro: Batch + JIT 路径逐帧更新 100 × 100 的立方体网格，使用双轴正弦波、一个方向光和一种共享材质，让渲染条件保持明确。
zh.home.demo.panel.item1: 测试环境：1920 × 1080、关闭垂直同步、Windows 11、Core Ultra 7 265K、RTX 5070 Ti 与 64 GB DDR5-6400。
zh.home.demo.panel.item2: 预热 60 帧后，一万个立方体的单材质负载在 Infernux 编辑器中平均 127 FPS，运行时平均 171 FPS；数据取自随后 300 帧。
zh.home.demo.panel.item3: Unity 6 只作为参考：着色复杂度、批处理和编辑器成熟度并不相同。比较结果前请先阅读完整方法与数据表。
zh.home.demo.panel.title: 基准证据与限制
zh.home.demo.title: 编辑器内运行的一万个立方体参考负载。
zh.home.hero.description: 熔炉（Infernux）是一个由 Python-C++ 混合编程构造的游戏引擎。 C++17 用于构造引擎的高性能核心， Python3.12 则用于实现编辑器工具，并作为游戏逻辑脚本提供给开发者。
zh.home.hero.kicker: 开源 · MIT · WIN64（多平台正在路上！）
zh.home.hero.moreActions: 探索 Infernux 的更多方式
zh.home.hero.platform: Windows 10/11 x64 · v0.2.1 技术预览 · 更多平台正在开发
zh.home.hero.title: 熔炉初燃，来一起添把火
zh.home.manifesto: 熔炉的立场很简单——商业引擎的授权费用越来越高，独立开发者与小团队的负担日益增长。商业引擎把创造的自由标上价格，开源就不再是选项，是答案。而这就是熔炉引擎的价值。
zh.home.status.card1.body: 渲染、物理、音频、Python 脚本、预制体、游戏 UI、编辑器编排、GUID 资产工作流、2D/3D 动画预览、蒙皮网格、资产预览、独立构建，以及 MCP 自动化平面（目录检索、令牌门禁、追踪与自进化）现已一并上线。
zh.home.status.card1.title: 运行时、编辑器与动画基础
zh.home.status.card2.body: 下一阶段集中在更丰富的 UI 控件、GPU 粒子、地形、上手资料以及更强的内容生产链路。
zh.home.status.card2.title: 高级 UI 与内容规模化
zh.home.status.intro: 引擎现已具备预览阶段的动画控制器、基础 Timeline 工作流，以及经过验证的 MCP 自动化平面；路线图仍标明尚需生产级打磨的部分。
zh.home.status.title: Release 0.2.1：动画控制器、Timeline，以及强验证 MCP 工作流。
zh.home.system.card1.body: 我们从知名的工具与游戏引擎中学习引擎的交互模式，尽可能减少开发者的迁移成本。我们有一个类Figma的独立UI编辑器，也有和Unity运行时完全一致的Python运行时。
zh.home.system.card1.title: 原则 I · 迁移方便
zh.home.system.card2.body: 渲染路径等复杂功能是用来扩展的，不是用来供着的。我们尽可能将可编程渲染管线以及其它类似的高级API构造得符合入门开发者的直觉
zh.home.system.card2.title: 原则 II · 符合直觉
zh.home.system.card3.body: 引擎的本体将采用且尽可能永久对独立开发者或小团队免费开源可商用，我们希望让更多的开发者能用上最先进水平的技术。
zh.home.system.card3.title: 原则 III · 没有商业陷阱
zh.home.system.intro: 这台引擎围绕工程控制权而不是平台绑定来设计。每条原则都为做真实游戏与真实工具的团队减少隐藏成本。
zh.home.system.title: 这台引擎的基础设计围绕着三个最核心的原则。
zh.pageTitle.community: 熔炉 · Infernux — 社区链路
zh.pageTitle.download: 熔炉 · Infernux — 已验证下载
zh.pageTitle.index: 熔炉 · Infernux — 开源游戏引擎
zh.pageTitle.roadmap: 熔炉 · Infernux — 发布路线图
zh.pageTitle.wiki: 熔炉 · Infernux — 文档中枢
zh.roadmap.hero.description: 熔炉正在从技术预览向更完整的生产管线推进。下面的优先级按发布杠杆和工作流影响来分组，而不是按宽泛的营销主题。
zh.roadmap.hero.title: 这是一份像工程进度表的路线图，不是一份装饰性愿景。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card1.item1: 在 0.2.1 的动画状态机、Timeline 与绑定角色工作流基础上继续推进。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card1.item2: 高级 UI 控件（ScrollView、Slider、布局组件）。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card1.item3: 更安全的资产重命名与依赖修复路径。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card1.title: 创作带
zh.roadmap.lanes.card2.item2: 支撑更大场景的地形系统。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card2.item3: 改进场景组织方式，便于内容复用。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card2.title: 内容带
zh.roadmap.lanes.card3.item2: 更稳健的项目生命周期，从原型到发布。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card3.title: 发布带
zh.roadmap.lanes.card4.item1: 随着引擎扩张，让内部所有权边界与结构保持清晰。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card4.item2: 避免意外复杂度抹掉项目最重要的优势。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card4.item3: 在保持原生性能的同时维护 Python 脚本能力。
zh.roadmap.lanes.card4.title: 架构带
zh.roadmap.lanes.intro: 每条带都在回答一个具体问题：团队能否更快创作、内容能否扩张、项目能否发布、架构能否在引擎成长时保持可读。
zh.roadmap.lanes.title: 路线图按“每条带能解锁什么”来切分，而不是按主题命名。
zh.roadmap.priorities.card1.body: 0.2.1 已经交付 2D / 3D 动画预览、Timeline、动画 FSM 与蒙皮网格。下一步重点是重定向、Blend Tree 与运行时控制面打磨。
zh.roadmap.priorities.card1.title: 动画系统打磨
zh.roadmap.priorities.card2.body: 基础 UI 系统（Canvas、Text、Image、Button）已稳定。接下来是 ScrollView、Slider、布局组件以及编辑器级 UI 工具。
zh.roadmap.priorities.card2.title: 高级 UI 控件
zh.roadmap.priorities.card3.body: API 参考已经自动生成。还需要入门指南、架构说明与示例项目来降低上手门槛。
zh.roadmap.priorities.card3.title: 文档与上手资料
zh.roadmap.priorities.intro: 这些工作项最有可能直接提升贡献者与早期项目的日常可用性。
zh.roadmap.priorities.title: 下两个里程碑里值得花精力的事情。
zh.roadmap.release.current.item1: Vulkan 渲染器、Python 脚本、12 面板编辑器、音频、Jolt 物理、预制体、游戏 UI、2D/3D 动画预览、蒙皮网格、资产预览与独立构建。
zh.roadmap.release.current.item2: 今天已经能用来做认真的技术预览：脚本、物理、音频、渲染、UI、动画预览与编辑器工具都跑在同一套栈里。
zh.roadmap.release.current.title: 运行时、编辑器与动画基础
zh.roadmap.release.long.item1: 网络基础与从原型到发布的更完整项目生命周期。
zh.roadmap.release.long.item2: 从 Windows-first 技术预览继续推进到多平台生产引擎。
zh.roadmap.release.long.title: 网络与项目生命周期
zh.roadmap.release.mid.item1: GPU 粒子系统、地形支持，以及更广的模型与材质管线。
zh.roadmap.release.mid.item2: 扩大引擎能承载的内容范围，同时不让内容复杂度压垮架构。
zh.roadmap.release.mid.title: 粒子、地形与内容管线
zh.roadmap.release.next.item1: 高级 UI 控件、GPU 粒子、地形与更强的内容生产链路。
zh.roadmap.release.next.item2: 支撑更大的项目，包含更丰富的运行时 UI、场景内容与生产工作流。
zh.roadmap.release.next.title: 高级 UI 与内容规模化
zh.wiki.health.intro: 此面板由搜索、CI 与 Agent 工作流共用的同一组索引生成，不会隐藏 Preview 或 Experimental 内容。
zh.wiki.health.kicker: 文档遥测 · 机器验证
zh.wiki.health.loading: 正在读取文档健康证据…
zh.wiki.health.noScript: 打开机器可读的文档健康报告。
zh.wiki.health.title: 直接了解文档覆盖、成熟度，以及证据最后一次核验时间。
zh.wiki.hero.description: 把这页当成熔炉的入口图：从这里进入脚本 API、架构笔记、仓库级搭建说明，以及更长篇的系统文档。
zh.wiki.hero.title: 文档应该减少不确定性，而不是只证明文档存在。
zh.wiki.library.intro: 这些页面解释熔炉是怎么组织起来的，以及在更复杂的项目里应该怎么使用它。
zh.wiki.library.title: 架构笔记、进阶指南与系统深挖。
zh.wiki.start.card1.body: 安装 Hub、创建项目、认识编辑器界面，并运行第一个场景。
zh.wiki.start.card1.title: 快速开始
zh.wiki.start.card2.body: 用 Python 添加行为、在 Inspector 暴露字段，并理解组件生命周期。
zh.wiki.start.card2.tag: 10 分钟 · 首个可运行结果
zh.wiki.start.card2.title: 第一个组件
zh.wiki.start.card3.body: 配置 Build Settings、生成 Windows 播放器，并在编辑器之外验证完整产物。
zh.wiki.start.card3.title: 构建并分享
zh.wiki.start.card4.body: 为场景、资产、渲染、物理、UI、动画与调试找到正确的系统指南。
zh.wiki.start.card4.title: 阅读引擎手册
zh.wiki.start.card5.body: 查阅类、方法、枚举、签名，以及适合代码和 Agent 工作流的稳定链接。
zh.wiki.start.card5.title: 查找 API 参考
zh.wiki.start.intro: First Flight 由三步组成，共需 25–40 分钟；完成第 2 步即可得到首个可运行结果，进度只保存在当前设备。手册解释系统，API 参考回答精确的符号问题。
zh.wiki.start.kicker: 从这里开始 · 引导路线
zh.wiki.start.title: 从安装到第一个运行中的组件，不再靠猜。
